nasb.text: Every valuation of yours, moreover, shall be after the shekel of the sanctuary. The shekel shall be twenty gerahs.

esv.text: Every valuation shall be according to the shekel of the sanctuary: twenty gerahs shall make a shekel.

cnv.text: 你的一切估價，都要照著聖所衡量銀子的標準。

ccb.text: 所有价银的称量要以圣所的秤为准，即二十季拉为一舍客勒。
